summary: Frontend regression for FACTS-style grouped sidebar + 4 new pages (/admissions, /health, /discipline, /re-enrollment). SUNF admin login -> /dashboard works. All 6 sidebar groups render (Overview, Admissions, People, Academics, Student Services, Administration), are collapsible, localStorage key 'lumina_sidebar_open_groups' persists across reload, and parent group auto-expands on direct navigation. All four pages load with loading spinner; stats cards, empty states, dialogs (rounded-2xl + p-6 + close-X + Cancel/Save with loading spinner), and CRUD toasts work. Admission Create flow verified end-to-end with 'Created successfully' toast. Logout redirects to /login. ~95% pass.

issues: Radix UI accessibility warning in console: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby={undefined} for {DialogContent}' on Admissions, Discipline, Health and Re-Enrollment dialogs. Non-blocking but should add <DialogDescription> for a11y.

action_items: (Optional) Add <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to DialogContent on AdmissionsPage, DisciplinePage, HealthPage, ReEnrollmentPage to silence Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: ReEnrollmentPage.fetchAcademicYears uses /api/schools and picks res.data[0] which is fine for admins (1 school) but for superuser viewing multiple tenants this would silently bind to the first school only. Consider binding to schoolCode from AuthContext.
AdmissionsPage stats are derived in fetchData but only after both requests succeed; if one fails the stats remain {0,0,0,0}. Minor.

HealthPage handleSubmit posts to /api/health/{studentId}/{dialogType} – ensure backend accepts 'allergy' / 'vaccination' / 'visit' as path segments (not pluralised). Backend tests already 100% green so assume OK.

Health page does not render Conditions or Medications tab content (TabsContent missing) — Vaccinations/Allergies/Visits only. Adding empty TabsContent for those tabs (or removing the triggers) would close the gap from review_request item 'Vaccinations/Allergies/Conditions/Medications/Visits tabs'.
test_credentials: SUNF/admin/Admin@123 (used). Sarah teacher and RVSD not retested this iteration.
seed_data_creation: Created one admissions inquiry record via UI (TestFirst TestLast / test<ts>@example.com) on SUNF tenant.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar localStorage key is 'lumina_sidebar_open_groups'. Data-testids confirmed working: sidebar-group-{overview,admissions,people,academics,student_services,admin}, nav-discipline, nav-inquiries-applications, admission/discipline/health-{dialog-close,cancel-btn,save-btn}, from-year-select, to-year-select, load-preview-btn, reenrollment-page, user-menu-btn, logout-btn. Health page only implements Vaccinations/Allergies/Visits TabsContent; Conditions+Medications triggers exist with no body. Re-enrollment empty academic-years branch not exercised because SUNF has academic_years configured (so from/to selects rendered, not empty-state).
rca of the issue: No bugs requiring RCA — UI features all confirmed working in browser.
